subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! God willing, mayest thou be swayed and stirred by the breezes of the divine Will from the celestial Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه انشاء الله از نسایم اراده رحمانیه از سدره ربانیه متمایل و متحرک باشی
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital
